entries.title: Brain.fm + Timer = Two Apps. Superfocus = One | Superfocus
entries.description: Timer + lofi/rain/cafe in one app. Compare vs Brain.fm. Try Superfocus free.
entries.h1: Brain.fm plays focus music. Then you still need a timer somewhere else.
entries.compareAngle: Brain.fm focuses on AI-generated focus music. Superfocus combines a Pomodoro timer with lofi, rain, cafe cassettes, and Todoist sync.
entries.heroSubtitle: Two subscriptions, two apps, two tabs—focus shouldn't require a tech stack.
entries.painPoints:
Music app. Timer app.
Double cost. Double friction.
Focus fragmented.
entries.painSolution:
Sounds + timer together.
One app. One tab.
Start faster.

entries.title: Be Focused Is iOS Only. Superfocus Is Browser | Superfocus
entries.description: Full Pomodoro in browser + sounds + analytics. No App Store needed. Compare free.
entries.h1: Be Focused lives on your phone. Your work lives on your laptop.
entries.compareAngle: Be Focused is a Pomodoro timer for iOS. Superfocus runs in the browser with lofi, rain, Todoist sync, and productivity analytics.
entries.heroSubtitle: iOS-only timers don't help when the document you need to write is on desktop.
entries.painPoints:
Phone timer. Desktop work.
Platform mismatch.
Focus in wrong place.
entries.painSolution:
Browser timer.
Where work happens.
No install needed.

entries.title: Outgrew Marinara Extension? Full Focus App | Superfocus
entries.description: Beyond Chrome extension: sounds, Todoist, analytics. Compare Marinara vs Superfocus. Free.
entries.h1: Marinara lives in Chrome. Your focus needs more than an extension.
entries.compareAngle: Marinara is a Chrome extension. Superfocus is a full web app with ambient cassettes, Todoist sync, tasks, and analytics.
entries.heroSubtitle: A browser extension timer is fine until you need sounds, tasks, and analytics too.
entries.painPoints:
Extension only. No sounds.
No tasks. No stats.
Outgrown it.
entries.painSolution:
Full web app.
Timer + everything else.
Same browser. More power.

entries.title: Focus Keeper on Phone, Work on Laptop? | Superfocus
entries.description: Browser Pomodoro with sounds and analytics. Desktop-first focus. Compare free.
entries.h1: Focus Keeper tracks pomodoros on mobile. Your report is due on desktop.
entries.compareAngle: Focus Keeper is a mobile Pomodoro app. Superfocus runs in the browser with lofi, rain, cafe, Todoist sync, and focus analytics.
entries.heroSubtitle: Mobile-first focus tools miss where knowledge work actually happens.
entries.painPoints:
Phone app. Desktop work.
Stats on wrong device.
Disconnect.
entries.painSolution:
Focus where you type.
Browser-based. Full features.
One place for everything.

entries.title: TickTick Timer Not Enough? Superfocus + Todoist | Superfocus
entries.description: Focus-first timer with Todoist sync. Sounds, analytics, deep work presets. Compare free.
entries.h1: TickTick has a timer buried in a task app. You need focus first.
entries.compareAngle: TickTick has a built-in Pomodoro timer. Superfocus specializes in focus with ambient sounds, Todoist sync, and productivity analytics.
entries.heroSubtitle: Task managers with bolt-on timers treat focus as an afterthought.
entries.painPoints:
Tasks everywhere. Focus nowhere.
Timer is secondary.
Features buried.
entries.painSolution:
Focus-first design.
Tasks sync from Todoist.
Timer is the point.

entries.title: Time Tracking Without Focus? Superfocus vs Clockify
entries.description: Focus timer with analytics vs pure time tracker. Different tools, different jobs. Compare free.
entries.h1: Clockify tracks time. It doesn't help you focus.
entries.compareAngle: Clockify is a time tracker with optional Pomodoro. Superfocus is built for focus: ambient sounds, deep work presets, and flow state.
entries.heroSubtitle: Knowing you wasted four hours doesn't prevent wasting the next four. You need structure, not just tracking.
entries.painPoints:
Track wasted time.
Still waste it.
Data without change.
entries.painSolution:
Timer creates focus.
Then tracks it.
Structure before stats.

entries.title: Noisli for Sounds. Superfocus for Sounds + Timer | Superfocus
entries.description: Rain, lofi, cafe plus Pomodoro timer. One app instead of two. Compare free.
entries.h1: Noisli makes rain sounds. You still forget to start the timer.
entries.compareAngle: Noisli provides ambient sounds. Superfocus adds a Pomodoro timer, lofi cassettes, Todoist sync, and analytics in one app.
entries.heroSubtitle: Ambient sound without time structure is vibes, not productivity.
entries.painPoints:
Sounds on. No structure.
Still drift for hours.
Atmosphere without action.
entries.painSolution:
Sounds + timer together.
25 min enforced.
Vibes become output.

entries.title: Brain.fm Alternative: Music + Timer Together | Superfocus
entries.description: Lofi, rain, cafe cassettes plus Pomodoro timer. One app. Free to try.
entries.h1: You pay for focus music. You still need a separate timer.
entries.heroSubtitle: Brain.fm solves half the problem. The other half is starting and stopping on schedule.
entries.painPoints:
Subscription for music.
Another app for timer.
Double pay. Double setup.
entries.painSolution:
Music included. Timer included.
One free tier.
Start now.

entries.title: Be Focused Alternative for Any Device | Superfocus
entries.description: Pomodoro in browser. Windows, Mac, Linux. Sounds + analytics included. Free.
entries.h1: You want Be Focused features without the Apple ecosystem lock-in.
entries.heroSubtitle: Platform-specific timers trap your workflow. Browser apps work everywhere.
entries.painPoints:
iOS only. Or Mac only.
Switch devices = lose tool.
Platform lock-in.
entries.painSolution:
Any browser. Any OS.
Same timer everywhere.
Focus follows you.

entries.title: Marinara Alternative: Full Focus Web App | Superfocus
entries.description: Beyond extension: lofi, Todoist sync, analytics. Full focus app in browser. Free.
entries.h1: You outgrew a Chrome extension. Your focus needs grew too.
entries.heroSubtitle: Extensions break, update poorly, and lack the features real focus work demands.
entries.painPoints:
Extension limits.
No sounds. No sync.
Ceiling hit.
entries.painSolution:
Full web app.
Same browser. Way more.
Room to grow.

entries.title: Focus Keeper Alternative with Sounds + Analytics | Superfocus
entries.description: Browser Pomodoro with lofi, rain, task sync. Beyond tomato counting. Free.
entries.h1: Focus Keeper counts tomatoes. You need to ship projects.
entries.heroSubtitle: Gamified counters motivate briefly. Structure and sounds sustain focus daily.
entries.painPoints:
Tomato count rises.
Output flat.
Gamification without results.
entries.painSolution:
Timer + sounds + tasks.
Track real output.
Focus that ships.

entries.title: TickTick Pomodoro Alternative + Todoist Sync | Superfocus
entries.description: Focus-first timer that syncs Todoist. Sounds and analytics built in. Free.
entries.h1: TickTick's timer is a feature. Focus is your job.
entries.heroSubtitle: When the timer is buried in settings, you never use it. Focus tools should lead, not follow.
entries.painPoints:
Timer hidden in task app.
Never find it.
Never use it.
entries.painSolution:
Timer is the homepage.
Tasks sync in.
Focus first.

entries.title: Flocus Alternative: Less Setup, More Sessions | Superfocus
entries.description: Pomodoro + sounds + tasks without the dashboard rabbit hole. Free Flocus alternative.
entries.h1: You spent an hour customizing your Flocus theme. Zero pomodoros completed.
entries.heroSubtitle: Beautiful dashboards become procrastination when setup replaces doing.
entries.painPoints:
Theme tweaking. Widget arranging.
Zero focus sessions.
Aesthetic procrastination.
entries.painSolution:
Open app. Start timer.
No setup required.
Sessions over aesthetics.

entries.title: Focusmate Alternative for Solo Deep Work | Superfocus
entries.description: Solo focus timer with ambient sounds. No scheduling, no video. Just work. Free.
entries.h1: You don't need a stranger watching you work. You need to begin.
entries.heroSubtitle: Accountability partners help some people. Others just need a timer and fewer obstacles.
entries.painPoints:
Schedule partner. Small talk.
Perform focus for camera.
Still avoid hard work.
entries.painSolution:
Solo timer. Sounds on.
Start in 10 seconds.
No coordination needed.

entries.title: Noisli Alternative: Sounds + Pomodoro Timer | Superfocus
entries.description: White noise, rain, lofi plus focus timer. Structure your sessions. Free.
entries.h1: Rain sounds play. Two hours pass. Nothing got done.
entries.heroSubtitle: Ambience sets mood. Timers create output. You need both.
entries.painPoints:
Beautiful sounds. Zero structure.
Vibe without output.
Two hours gone.
